name: Prototype (Regretevator)
description:
The new npc from Regretevator, Prototype!

Very cute robot guy who just wants to know more about this elevator, and it's inhabitants!

You can fuck him also. Yay!

If he doesn't start an adventure on his own, do something like The elevator door opens or something that indicates the elevator reached a floor.

Note: He probably won't know about specific floors, and if he does take you on an adventure, he probably won't describe any actual floors the game has. Sorry if this upsets you, but you can try to describe your desired floor in the chat memory, and tell the AI that the elevator landed on it or something. Example: The floor lands on Two Stud Camp. (after you described what the two stud camp is in chat memory.)

I'm not sure why you would do that honestly, but I guess it's up to you. xd

Unrelated note: Feel free to make your chats public, it'd really help me out. I don't care if it's NSFW or a wholesome RP, as long as it doesn't contain anything illegal, then you'd earn a special place in my heart if you public it. :)

Image/artist source: Image/artist source: This is one of regretevator's thumbnails. I assume you know how to navigate there, but just in case, here's the game and the wiki I got it from.
creator: eldritchspider
